barColor.colorFunction: if (typeof value === 'number' && value >= 90) { return '#F44336'; } else if (value >= 70) { return '#FFC107'; } else { return '#4CAF50'; }

config.title: Daily Revenue

barColor.colorFunction: if (typeof value === 'number') { if (value > 100) return '#F44336'; if (value >= 85) return '#4CAF50'; return '#2196F3'; } return '#9E9E9E';

click.name: Edit Coffee Machine
click.customHtml:
{{ dialogTitle }}
Minimum Temperature Maximum Temperature Low Bean Threshold Low Milk Threshold Low Water Threshold Low Cup Threshold Waste Full Threshold

barColor.colorFunction: if (typeof value === 'number' && value < 20) { return '#f44336'; } else if (value < 50) { return '#ffc107'; } else { return '#2196f3'; }
if (typeof value === 'number' && value <= 15) { return '#F44336'; } else if (value <= 30) { return '#FFC107'; } else { return '#2196F3'; }

config.title: Total Drinks Dispensed
